<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["contacts","strategy"],"properties":{"strategy":{"type":"string","enum":["merge","replace"]},"contacts":{"type":"object","additionalProperties":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"id":{"type":"string"},"contactId":{"type":"string"},"name":{"type":"string"},"role":{"type":"string"},"phone":{"type":"string"},"email":{"type":"string"},"notes":{"type":"string"},"picture":{"type":"string"},"isPrimary":{"type":"boolean"},"createdAt":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"updatedAt":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"}},"title":"Contact"}}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>
